nodes.label: Tests for gae.profile_scorer — ProfileScorer, KernelType, ScoringResult.  12 t
Build a scorer with random [0,1] centroids and a simple profile.
Centroidal synthetic benchmark: well-separated centroids, Gaussian noise.     V
Lower τ → sharper softmax → higher max probability.
Build a ProfileScorer from dimensional args with random [0,1] centroids.
When correct=False with gt_action_index, predicted is pushed and GT is pulled.
Predicted centroid moves away from f; GT centroid moves toward f.
Without gt_action_index, emits DeprecationWarning and moves only predicted.
Regression: old bug pushed all n_actions centroids; fix touches exactly 2.
Verify correct=True still pulls only the predicted centroid toward f.
Return (scorer, mu_6x4x6, factors_6) with min_confidence set.
Update with confidence below threshold: centroids unchanged, delta_norm=0.
Update with confidence above threshold applies normally (delta_norm > 0).
Default min_confidence=0.0 means all updates fire regardless of confidence.
confidence=None bypasses the gate entirely (backward compatible).
Gate stats correctly track applied vs gated counts and gate_rate.
Calling update() without confidence arg works as before (backward compat).
Gate stats start at zero before any updates.
Return (scorer_default, scorer_asym, factors_6) with identical centroids.     B
Override path uses eta_override → smaller centroid_delta_norm than eta_neg.
eta_override=None stores None and uses eta_neg as before.
Confirmation (correct=True) uses self.eta regardless of eta_override.
With eta_override, GT-pull delta is attenuated relative to default.
eta_override is accessible as an attribute.
eta_neg >= 1.0 must raise ValueError — destroys calibration (ECE=0.49).
η_neg=0.99 must NOT raise — guard is >= 1.0, not > 1.0.
Return (scorer, mu_6cat_4act_6fac, f_6) with optional factor mask.
mask=None → all factors active, scorer.factor_mask is None.
Masking factors changes score output vs no mask.
Update must not change masked centroid dimensions.
All-zero mask → all distances equal → uniform probabilities.
factor_mask is stored as float64 array.
centroids property exposes the centroid tensor via the public API.
scoring_kernel=L2Kernel() must produce identical results to no kernel.
DiagonalKernel(ones) must produce same scores as L2Kernel().
DiagonalKernel with very large σ on last dim must be insensitive to that dim.
Centroid update with L2Kernel must equal update without kernel.
factor_mask + scoring_kernel must both apply: masked dims have no effect.
Amplifying an informative dimension should change action ranking.
auto_pause_on_amber=False by default; scorer starts unpaused.
AMBER status blocks centroid update; delta_norm==0, outcome contains 'paused'.
GREEN after AMBER clears pause; next update applies normally.
auto_pause_on_amber=False: AMBER status does NOT freeze learning.
conservation_status property reflects the last set_conservation_status call.
CALIBRATING is not AMBER or RED; auto_pause must not fire for it.
Warning fires when eta != eta_neg and eta_override is None.
No RuntimeWarning when eta == eta_neg (symmetric defaults).
for_soc() sets P0 fix and auto-pause defaults.
score() returns entropy that is a finite float >= 0.
confidence_gap == sorted_probs[0] - sorted_probs[1] > 0 when one action clearly
Factor vector of length d+1 raises AssertionError (shape mismatch).
category_index = n_categories + 1 raises AssertionError (out of bounds).
freeze() does not affect score() — only update() is blocked.
Centroids containing NaN raise ValueError during score().
update(correct=1) treats int 1 as truthy — confirmation path runs.
Factor vector of wrong length raises AssertionError in update().
centroids setter copies the array — mutating the source does not affect the scor
eta_override=0.0 on incorrect path produces zero centroid movement.
